decisions.description: We have 3 outcomes here: 1. Send the appointment details via Email for default appointments. 2. Send the appointment details via Email for Telemedicine Ambulatory appointments. 3. The default outcome - which is the other appointments that need a different email template.
decisions.name: Appointment_Details_Email
decisions.label: Appointment Details, Email
